taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, Data Analysis
skill_match_scores: Data Science:1.0, Computer Science:1.0, Statistics:1.0, Business Analytics:0.5, Data Analysis:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Business Analytics, Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent project experience), 3 – 5 years of professional experience or strong academic/project experience in data/AI, analytics, data science, or business intelligence, Execute well-defined analytical tasks with guidance and assist in model monitoring, data quality checks, and prompt testing, Strong analytical skills with comfort in SQL, Excel, and Python (pandas, matplotlib, scikit-learn basics), Familiarity with cloud data environments (AWS, Azure, GCP) and willingness to learn MLOps/PromptOps tools, Strong understanding of AI/ML concepts and interest in generative AI systems, Strong attention to detail and a passion for data quality and governance, Excellent communication skills—able to summarize technical results for nontechnical audiences, Growth mindset: eager to learn AI governance, prompt engineering, and agentic AI concepts on the job
core_responsibilities: Take ownership of assigned projects or components, moving ideas from concept to execution while tracking progress, stakeholders, and changes under guidance from senior team members, Participate in mapping out and documenting processes for the deployment, scaling, and ongoing improvement of AI platforms used across business units, Prepare and share meeting notes, research summaries, process documentation, and action items with teams in a timely and accessible manner, Contribute to a collaborative, feedback-driven work culture that encourages continuous improvement and learning, Assist in maintaining and validating data models and shared definitions that help align analytics, AI outputs, and business concepts across teams, Supports data preparation, documentation, and testing activities, Run exploratory analyses to identify trends, anomalies, and insights in construction and project data, Assist in testing and evaluating AI/ML model outputs and generative AI prompts for accuracy, relevance, and compliance, Track key metrics for AI solutions (accuracy, bias, adoption, governance checkpoints), Support the development of dashboards, reports, and visualizations to communicate AI outcomes to business stakeholders
job_summary: McCarthy Holdings, Inc. is a leading employee-owned construction company in America, dedicated to fostering a culture of great experiences and high-performing teams. The AI Analyst II will support the development and governance of AI systems in the construction business, focusing on data workflows and translating technical results into business insights.
